title: ITALY enforcement action against Istituto San Giuseppe La Salle di Milano (12,000)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 12,000 on the Istituto San Giuseppe La Salle di Milano. The controller uses video surveillance in its building. During school hours, a minor was involved in an accident which was captured by a surveillance camera. A video of the incident, play...
